arts.ttl: Beto expresses desire to leave Everton for Torino in January
arts.sum: Everton striker Beto is reportedly eager to leave the club during the January transfer window, with Torino emerging as a potential destination. According to reports from Tuttosport, the Portuguese forward has communicated his wish to return to Serie A, where he previously enjoyed success with Udinese. The post Beto expresses desire to leave Everton for Torino in January appeared first on FootItalia.com.
